name: Seasoned New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water in a 2-quart shallow casserole dish.
2. Microwave on High for 12 to 15 seconds.
3. Add bouillon granules and stir until dissolved.
4. Stir in seasoned salt and lemon juice.
5. Scrub potatoes and cut into 1/2-inch slices.
6. Place the sliced potatoes in the seasoned liquid in the casserole dish.
7. Cover with heavy-duty plastic wrap.
8. Microwave on High for 14 to 16 minutes, or until potatoes are tender, stirring after every 4 minutes.
9. Add butter; cover and microwave on High for 1 minute.
10. Gently stir in parsley.
11. Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
